mapper.select: select pi.cmn_facility_item_no , pi.cmn_facility_no , pi.item_nm , pi.cmn_facility_stts_cd , pf.cmn_facility_nm from public_item pi inner join public_facility pf on pf.cmn_facility_no = pi.cmn_facility_no inner join facility f on f.facility_no = pf.facility_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} order by pi.cmn_facility_item_no desc
select cmn_facility_item_no , cmn_facility_no , item_nm , cmn_facility_stts_cd from public_item where cmn_facility_no = #{cmnFacilityNo} order by cmn_facility_item_no desc
select cmn_facility_item_no , cmn_facility_no , item_nm , cmn_facility_stts_cd from public_item where cmn_facility_item_no = #{cmnFacilityItemNo}

choose.when:
select * from ( select pf.cmn_facility_no , pf.cmn_facility_nm , pf.facility_no , null as cmn_facility_item_no , null as item_nm , null as cmn_facility_stts_cd from public_facility pf inner join facility f on f.facility_no = pf.facility_no and f.apt_cmplex_no = pf.apt_cmplex_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and pf.cmn_facility_no is not null
and ( lower(pf.cmn_facility_no) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' or lower(pf.cmn_facility_nm) like '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' )
order by pf.cmn_facility_no asc ) where rownum <= 10
choose.otherwise:
select distinct
pi.cmn_facility_item_no , pi.item_nm , pi.cmn_facility_no , pf.cmn_facility_nm , pf.facility_no , pi.cmn_facility_stts_cd
min(pi.cmn_facility_item_no) as cmn_facility_item_no , min(pi.item_nm) as item_nm , pi.cmn_facility_no , pf.cmn_facility_nm , pf.facility_no , min(pi.cmn_facility_stts_cd) as cmn_facility_stts_cd
pi.cmn_facility_item_no , pi.item_nm , pi.cmn_facility_no , pf.cmn_facility_nm , pf.facility_no , pi.cmn_facility_stts_cd
from public_item pi inner join public_facility pf on pf.cmn_facility_no = pi.cmn_facility_no inner join facility f on f.facility_no = pf.facility_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo}
and pi.cmn_facility_item_no like 'ITEM' || #{keyword} || '%'
and pi.cmn_facility_no like 'CMN' || #{keyword} || '%'
and pi.item_nm like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
group by pi.cmn_facility_no, pf.cmn_facility_nm, pf.facility_no
order by 1 fetch first 10 rows only
